main.description: SSH public key registration record for fedproxy tunnel authentication. Associates an SSH public key with a fedproxy service name so the tunnel can verify connecting clients.

service.description: Fedproxy service name this SSH key is registered for (e.g. attest, compute). Must match a service configured on the fedproxy host.

publicKey.description: SSH public key in OpenSSH authorized_keys format (e.g. ssh-ed25519 AAAA...).
